product_data.Features: Industry-leading noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, speak-to-chat technology, crystal clear hands-free calling, foldable design

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Hello! I came across your listing for the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones and I'm really interested in them. I was wondering if there's any room for negotiation on the price? Thank you!

conversation_history.speaker: Buyer
conversation_history.message: Thank you for the information. I have a budget of $478.80 for this purchase. Would you be able to offer a lower price than $399 to accommodate my budget?
